title: A state banquet, selfies with Musk and Huang's noodle run: The spectacle of Trump's Beijing visit
summary: Trump's Beijing visit featured diplomatic pageantry, business discussions, and high-profile moments including meetings with prominent business figures. The visit highlighted efforts at strategic engagement while generating media attention through celebrity-adjacent events.
content: The visit was full of friendly overtures, orchestrated pageantry, business dealmaking, and headline-grabbing sideshows.

zh.title: 国宴、与马斯克自拍和黄仁勋的面条之行：特朗普北京访问的壮观场景
zh.summary: 特朗普的北京访问展现了外交仪式、商务讨论和高调时刻，包括与杰出商界人士的会晤。此次访问强调了战略接触的努力，同时通过名人相关活动产生了媒体关注。

title: ‘He is retired’: Should my husband take his Social Security at 62 and invest it?
summary: This personal finance piece examines the decision of when to claim Social Security benefits, weighing early claiming at 62 against delaying for larger future payments. The article explores the trade-offs between immediate income and long-term retirement income optimization.
content: “His Social Security benefit would be $1,600 per month, since he stayed home with the kids while I worked.”

zh.title: "他已经退休了"：我丈夫应该在62岁时领取社会保障金并投资吗？
zh.summary: 这篇个人财务文章探讨了何时申请社会保障福利的决定，权衡62岁提前申请与推迟以获得更大未来支付之间的取舍。文章探讨了立即收入和长期退休收入优化之间的权衡。

title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
summary: Billionaire hedge fund manager Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital built a position in Microsoft during market weakness, signaling confidence in the tech giant's AI and cloud computing prospects. The move reflects investor optimism about Microsoft's competitive position in key growth sectors.
content: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.

zh.title: 比尔·阿克曼在第一季度下跌期间建立微软股份，押注人工智能和云增长
zh.summary: 亿万富豪对冲基金经理比尔·阿克曼的Pershing Square Capital在市场疲弱期间建立了微软头寸，表明对这家科技巨头人工智能和云计算前景的信心。此举反映了投资者对微软在关键增长部门竞争地位的乐观态度。

title: Russia's Putin to meet China's Xi in Beijing from May 19-20, Beijing and Moscow say
summary: Russian President Putin will visit Beijing to meet with Chinese President Xi in May, part of broader diplomatic engagement between the two nations. The visit comes shortly after U.S. President Trump's own Beijing trip, marking a significant geopolitical moment.
content: Putin's trip follows shortly after U.S. President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing.

zh.title: 俄罗斯普京将于5月19日至20日在北京与中国习近平会面，北京和莫斯科表示
zh.summary: 俄罗斯总统普京将访问北京与中国主席习近平会面，这是两国更广泛外交接触的一部分。这次访问发生在美国总统特朗普自己访问北京之后不久，标志着一个重要的地缘政治时刻。

title: ‘I nearly made a major misstep’: I claimed my Social Security benefits at 64 instead of 70. Here’s why.
summary: A retiree shares their experience claiming Social Security at 64 rather than waiting until 70, illustrating the complexity of retirement income decisions. The story highlights how many people struggle to optimize their financial planning despite the long-term consequences.
content: “It’s remarkable — and discouraging — how many people are disengaged from their own financial lives.”

zh.title: "我差点犯了一个大错"：我在64岁而非70岁时申请了社会保险福利。原因如下
zh.summary: 一位退休人员分享了在64岁而非等到70岁时申请社会保险的经历，说明了退休收入决定的复杂性。这个故事突出了许多人尽管存在长期后果，仍然很难优化他们的财务规划。

title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
summary: Taiwan was a central focus of discussions between Trump and Xi Jinping, with U.S. arms sales to the island nation featuring prominently in their talks. The island's status remains a critical point of tension in U.S.-China relations.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.

zh.title: 为什么台湾成为特朗普-习近平谈话中的决定性议题
zh.summary: 台湾是特朗普和习近平之间讨论的中心焦点，美国对该岛国的军售在他们的谈话中占据重要地位。该岛的地位仍然是美中关系中一个关键的紧张点。

title: My husband took out a $100,000 Parent PLUS loan for his daughter. She dropped out, citing mental-health issues. Should we refinance?
summary: A parent faces financial hardship after borrowing $100,000 through Parent PLUS loans for their daughter's education, which she abandoned due to mental health concerns. The family now confronts limited options for managing substantial debt with minimal prospects for repayment.
content: “There is little to no chance that she will ever be able to repay these loans.”

zh.title: 丈夫为女儿贷款10万美元，女儿因心理健康问题退学，我们应该重新融资吗?
zh.summary: 一位家长在为女儿教育借入10万美元的Parent PLUS贷款后面临财务困难，而她的女儿因心理健康问题放弃了学业。这个家庭现在面临有限的债务管理选择，几乎没有还款前景。

title: FDA shuffles top drug, biologics leaders in latest shakeup
summary: The FDA is reorganizing its top leadership in drug and biologics regulation following the recent departure of former commissioner Marty Makary. This leadership transition signals potential policy shifts in how the agency regulates pharmaceutical and biologics development.
content: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration is shuffling its top drug and biologics regulators, days after the departure of former commissioner Marty Makary.

zh.title: FDA在最新改组中调整药物和生物制剂领导层
zh.summary: FDA在前任主任Marty Makary最近离职后，正在重组其药物和生物制剂监管的最高领导层。这次领导层过渡表明该机构在如何监管药物和生物制剂开发方面可能出现政策转变。
